title: CI/CD GitHub Actions pipeline with lint, test, security, and dialyzer jobs

story.i_want_to: configure a GitHub Actions CI pipeline with separate jobs for linting (format, credo), testing (compile warnings-as-errors, ExUnit with PostgreSQL), security (sobelow), and static analysis (dialyzer with PLT caching)
story.so_that: every push and PR is automatically validated for code quality, correctness, security, and type safety before merging

rationale: Automated CI is essential for maintaining code quality when AI agents are the primary developers. Agents can produce code that compiles but has subtle issues detectable by Credo, Sobelow, or Dialyzer. Separate jobs allow parallel execution and clear failure attribution. PLT caching is critical for Dialyzer performance (first run can take 10+ minutes).

acceptance_criteria.description: A .github/workflows/ci.yml file exists and triggers on push to master and on all pull requests
The lint job runs: mix format --check-formatted, mix deps.unlock --check-unused, and mix credo --strict
The test job runs: mix compile --warnings-as-errors and mix test, with a PostgreSQL 16 service container
The security job runs: mix sobelow --config
The dialyzer job runs: mix dialyzer, with PLT files cached between runs using actions/cache
All jobs use a consistent Elixir/OTP version matrix (Elixir 1.18+, OTP 27+) via erlef/setup-beam action
Dependencies and _build are cached between runs using actions/cache keyed on mix.lock hash
A deploy job exists that runs only on push to master, after all other jobs pass, on the self-hosted runner (beelink label)
A .sobelow-conf file exists in the project root with appropriate configuration

test_cases.name: CI workflow file is valid YAML
steps: Validate it has on, jobs, and expected job names
expected_results: Jobs include: lint, test, security, dialyzer, deploy

test_cases.name: Lint job checks formatting, unused deps, and credo
expected_results: Job includes steps for mix format --check-formatted
Job includes steps for mix deps.unlock --check-unused
Job includes steps for mix credo --strict

test_cases.name: Test job has PostgreSQL service container
steps: Inspect the test job services section
expected_results: A postgres service is defined with image postgres:16
Environment variables for POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_DB are set
Health check is configured for the postgres service

test_cases.name: Deploy job has correct conditions and runner
expected_results: Job has needs: [lint, test, security, dialyzer]
Job has if condition for push to master branch
Job runs-on: self-hosted with beelink label

test_cases.name: Dialyzer PLT cache is configured
steps: Inspect the dialyzer job for cache action usage
expected_results: An actions/cache step caches the PLT directory (typically _build/dev/*.plt or priv/plts/)
Cache key includes the OTP/Elixir version and mix.lock hash

test_cases.name: mix format passes on current codebase
expected_results: Command exits with status 0 (all files are formatted)

technical_notes: Use erlef/setup-beam@v1 for consistent Elixir/OTP installation
PLT cache key should include OTP and Elixir versions: ${{ runner.os }}-plt-${{ env.OTP_VERSION }}-${{ env.ELIXIR_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('mix.lock') }}
PostgreSQL service: image: postgres:16, env: POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres, ports: ['5432:5432'], options: --health-cmd pg_isready
Test job needs MIX_ENV=test and DATABASE_URL pointing to the service container
The deploy job shell script will be fully defined in US-1.7
All test modules MUST use `async: true` (e.g., `use Loopctl.DataCase, async: true` or `use LoopctlWeb.ConnCase, async: true`)
All tests using Mox MUST include `setup :verify_on_exit!`
All mocks MUST be defined centrally in `test/support/mocks.ex`, never in individual test files
